description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a black and chrome color scheme, featuring a long, cushioned seat suitable for two riders. The frame is robust, with visible metal components including the exhaust pipes, engine block, and spoked wheels. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a round headlight, side mirrors, and a set of handlebars with control levers. The rear section includes a license plate, rear suspension springs, and a single exhaust pipe on the right side. The tires are thick and treaded, designed for urban and road use. The overall design suggests a blend of retro and modern elements, likely from a well-known manufacturer.
description: A black and chrome classic motorcycle with a long seat, spoked wheels, and visible engine and exhaust details. It features a round headlight, side mirrors, and a rear license plate.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the motorcycle, the seat, engine, and both wheels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the license plate, rear wheel, and exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine, spoked wheels, and the full profile of the seat and frame.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view focusing on the headlight, handlebars, and front wheel.
